headline: OPKO Health (OPK) Up 17.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: OPKO Health (OPK) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Josh Brown's 'best stocks in the market': Edwards Lifesciences
summary: Josh Brown, CEO of Ritholtz Wealth Management, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to detail Ritholt's new "Porterhouse" strategy. Josh also spotlights Edwards Lifesciences in his "Best Stocks in the Market."

headline: Is Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Strength?
summary: Wondering if Edwards Lifesciences at around US$86.51 is offering good value today, or if the recent share price leaves little margin for error. The stock has returned 4.3% over the last week, 3.7% over the past month, 1.4% year to date, and 12.8% over the past year, while the 3 year return sits at 2.7% and the 5 year return shows a decline of 7.4%. Recent coverage has focused on Edwards Lifesciences as a key player in medical equipment, with attention on how its products fit into long term...
